entries.ability.training-strike.name: Training Strike
entries.ability.training-guard.name: Training Guard
entries.ability.training-guard.description: Steels the caster or a nearby ally, raising their Armor for two of their activations.
entries.ability.training-snare.name: Training Snare
entries.ability.training-snare.description: Sets a snare on an empty cell within reach, ready for the first enemy to step on it.
entries.status.training-guarded.name: Guarded
entries.battle-object.training-snare-object.name: Snare
entries.battle-object.training-snare-object.desc: Penalizes the next movement refill of an enemy entering its cell.
entries.language.en.name: English
entries.language.fr.name: French
